$schema_note: Static reference data: starter activity ideas for LDS youth quorum/class planning. Read by the activity_suggester agent and can be surfaced as inspiration in the planning UI. Categories follow the user-facing taxonomy (spiritual, physical, social, intellectual, service). Note: the database `activity_category` enum currently uses `skill` instead of `intellectual` — when the agent maps these into draft activity rows, treat `intellectual` ↔ `skill`, or align the enum in a future migration.

ideas.title: Testimony night
ideas.description: Quiet, low-pressure evening where each youth shares a brief testimony or a scripture that's meant something to them this month.

ideas.title: Come, Follow Me deep dive
ideas.description: Pick the upcoming Sunday's CFM block and study it together — read, mark, discuss application questions in small groups.

ideas.title: Temple grounds walk and discussion
ideas.description: Drive to the nearest temple, walk the grounds, and discuss the temple's symbolism and personal preparation.

ideas.title: Sacrament-meeting talk prep workshop
ideas.description: Practice writing and delivering a 3-minute talk. Pair up, give feedback, rotate.

ideas.title: Hymn study night
ideas.description: Pick three hymns; read the lyrics together, share what each verse teaches, sing them.

ideas.title: Basketball night
ideas.description: Open-gym basketball, warm-up drills, then half-court teams.

ideas.title: Ultimate frisbee
ideas.description: Field game, two teams, simple rules. Great for mixed athleticism.

ideas.title: Capture the flag (after dark)
ideas.description: Glow-stick capture the flag. High energy, low cost.

ideas.title: Evening hike
ideas.description: Short local trail, devotional at the summit, snacks.

ideas.title: Backyard ninja-warrior course
ideas.description: Build an obstacle course from cones, ladders, ropes; time everyone.

ideas.title: Group bike ride
ideas.description: Plan a route, ride together, ice cream stop on the way back.

ideas.title: Board-game night
ideas.description: Stations of group-friendly games (Codenames, Werewolf, Telestrations).

ideas.title: Pizza and a short film
ideas.description: Pizza followed by a short Church-produced film, then quick discussion.

ideas.title: Neighborhood scavenger hunt
ideas.description: Photo scavenger hunt around the meetinghouse or local park.

ideas.title: Talent night
ideas.description: Each youth shares a 3-minute talent — instrument, magic, juggling, art.

ideas.title: Progressive dinner
ideas.description: Three homes, three courses (appetizer, main, dessert).

ideas.title: Financial literacy 101
ideas.description: Tithing, savings, simple budgeting, what compound interest does over 50 years.

ideas.title: Public speaking practice
ideas.description: Impromptu speech drill, then a short structured talk with feedback.

ideas.title: Backyard science demos
ideas.description: Three or four hands-on demos (Mentos+Coke, elephant toothpaste, pendulum waves).

ideas.title: Mini chess tournament
ideas.description: Round-robin chess, quick games (10-minute clocks).

ideas.title: Friendly debate night
ideas.description: Light topics, two-vs-two debates with a moderator.

ideas.title: Yard cleanup for widows in the ward
ideas.description: Coordinate with Relief Society, split into teams, mow/rake/weed.

ideas.title: Food bank volunteer shift
ideas.description: Sign up for a sorting/packing shift at the local food bank.

ideas.title: Letters to ward missionaries
ideas.description: Write personal notes to each missionary serving from the ward.

ideas.title: Hygiene-kit assembly
ideas.description: Assemble kits for a local shelter or refugee resettlement org.

ideas.title: Hand-written notes to elderly members
ideas.description: Each youth writes a short note to two homebound or elderly ward members.

ideas.title: Meetinghouse grounds cleanup
ideas.description: Pick up litter, sweep walkways, clear weeds around the building.
